constraints: Keep routing correction separate from new governance semantics.
Do not duplicate workflow task progress into the roadmap.
Make broad adapter generation opt-in and evidence-based.
non_goals: Resolve SAG-001 in this planning workflow.
Change the current v0.4.1 activation gate.

steps: Create one backlog item with selective-promotion acceptance criteria.
Assign patch-safe discovery correction to v0.4.1 candidate selection.
Assign the adapter contract and validation work to v0.5.0.
Make v0.6.0 taxonomy depend on the stabilized contract.
Update backlog and workflow discovery indexes.
execution.last_completed_step: Persisted the backlog item, release timing, dependency, and discovery updates.
execution.next_action: Activate the bounded correction or governance workflow only when its roadmap gate is reached.

results.summary: Created SAG-001 with a v0.5.0 target, recorded the v0.4.1 routing-only patch candidate, and made v0.6.0 taxonomy consume rather than redefine the adapter contract.
results.residual_risk: The routing omission and validator blind spot remain until their version-specific execution workflows are authorized.
